jedis.signature: Long zrevrank(final byte[] key, final byte[] member)

returns.description: The element as an integer if the element exists. A 'nil' bulk reply if there is no such element.

jedis.signature: Long zrevrank(final String key, final String member)

returns.description: The element as an integer if the element exists. A 'nil' bulk reply if there is no such element.

params.name: key
params.description: the key.

params.name: member
params.description: the member type: value.

returns.description: Long integer-reply the rank of member. If member does not exist in the sorted set or key does not exist return null.

ioredis.signature: zrevrank(key: RedisKey, member: string | Buffer | number, callback?: Callback<number | null>)

nredisstack_sync.signature: SortedSetRank(RedisKey key, RedisValue member, Order order = Order.Ascending, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the sorted set.

params.name: member
params.description: The member to get the rank of.

params.name: order
params.description: The order to sort by (defaults to ascending).

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: If member exists in the sorted set, the rank of member. If member does not exist in the sorted set or key does not exist, null.
